utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I am moving out , like we talked about .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well I did not think that was serious .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know I thought that was just a fight .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , it was a fight ... based on serious stuff , remember ? About how I never lived alone or anything ? I just think it would be good for me , you know , help me to grow or ... Whatever .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I just think it would be good for me , you know , help me to grow or ... Whatever .
